author: lOrm
content: Implemented denial tracking in src/permissions.rs. Constants MAX_CONSECUTIVE_DENIALS=5 / MAX_TOTAL_DENIALS=20. New PermissionManager fields consecutive_denials/total_denials; methods record_denial (increments both via saturating_add), record_allowed (resets consecutive only), escalation_state -> EscalationState { Normal, ShouldAbort }, reset_denial_tracking. 7 new tests under denial_tracking_*. Forensic evidence: cargo test --lib = 1391 passed/0 failed (baseline 1384 + 7 new); cargo clippy --lib --tests -- -D warnings exit 0; no #[allow] / #[ignore] / clippy.toml. CC parity: denialTracking.ts.
